charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1101_0100:
[Name:PlayerNickname ] saw Kieran and
his Furret playing together.
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_0400:
Funny running into you out here. I was just
playing with Furret.
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_0500:
I met him back in Kitakami, and we’ve been
together ever since. He’s special to me.
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_0600:
Battling together here on Pasio has been
a blast!
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_0700:
There was a stretch when I stopped battling
with Furret.
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_0401_0900:
I can talk about it...but it’s not exactly a
happy story.
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_1200:
This was back when I was trying to be the
best of the best at Blueberry Academy.
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_1300:
All I did was think up battle strategies, how
to get stronger, how to win...
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_1400:
I decided to battle with Pokémon other
than Furret.
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_1500:
Back then, I figured that was the only way
to win.
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_1600: Looking back, I dunno if it was the right call.
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_1700: I was so fixated on winning, I got impatient.
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_1800:
And in the end...I couldn’t beat the one
person I most wanted to beat.
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_1900:
After all that, here on Pasio, where bonds
with Pokémon become real power...
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_2000:
I’m gonna battle alongside the Pokémon
I love! Furret and I will try all sorts of
strategies!
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_2100:
In team battles, we might be able to make
the most of Furret’s moves. And I want to
master our sync move, too!
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_2200:
When I think about it, I just get more and
more excited!
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_2300:
Furret and I are gonna be the best of the
best here on Pasio!
charaepi_ch0357_10_suguri/2301_1201_2500: Furret and I won’t hold back!
